scenarios.name: A1_baseline
scenarios.description: Baseline: 60% upstream discrepancy branch after medicines reconciliation and 20% medic-written discharge prescription error loop.

tasks.name: drug_history
tasks.note: Data-team fit from available timing data: lognormal selected by AIC; KS p=0.064; shape=0.520 scale=9.843

tasks.name: medicines_reconciliation
tasks.note: Data-team fit from available timing data: lognormal selected by AIC; KS p=0.036; shape=0.537 scale=14.824; technicians can support the non-verification medicines reconciliation pathway in baseline

tasks.name: upstream_discrepancy_resolution
tasks.note: Upstream discrepancy resolution after medicines reconciliation; triangular min=1 mode=3.5 max=10; junior/senior pharmacy assumption pending client confirmation

tasks.name: medic_prescription_error_resolution
tasks.note: Resolution of medic-written discharge prescription error after failed discharge verification; triangular min=1 mode=3.5 max=10; junior/senior only because this likely requires clinical judgement or prescriber liaison

tasks.name: prescription_verification
tasks.note: Data-team fit/update from available timing data: Prescription Verification lognormal; shape=0.881 scale=2.338. Diagnosis and treatment planning is acknowledged upstream but not timed in DES.

tasks.name: discharge_prescription_writing
tasks.note: Data-team fit/update from available timing data: Discharge prescription written gamma alpha=3.408 beta=2.964

tasks.name: discharge_prescription_verification
tasks.note: Data-team fit/update from available timing data: Discharge Prescription Verified gamma alpha=2.120 beta=8.172; junior pharmacist-led verification, senior eligible only for independent medic-error re-verification

tasks.name: patient_counselling
tasks.note: Data-team fit from available timing data: Patient Counselling gamma selected by AIC; KS p=0.85; alpha=3.103 beta=1.351; technicians, juniors, and seniors can support counselling in baseline
